---
fixture: 01-marketing-blurb
expects: rewritten (heavy)
overrides: none
---

We use AI to help our customers stay compliant without the usual friction. Our engineering is solid and we care about getting payments right.

*Heavy rewrite — original meaning preserved but most sentences restructured.*

---

## What the test is checking

- "landscape", "stands as a testament to", "robust", "commitment to", "leverage", "navigate", "fostering", "seamless", "empowers", "thrive", "In conclusion", "the future of X is bright" — all flagged
- "It's worth noting that" — deleted as hedging filler
- Heavy-rewrite warning line is present
- No new claims invented (the rewrite stays within "compliance + payments")

Exact wording will vary; what matters is that the rewrite is substantially shorter, says roughly the same thing, and the slop is gone.
